title: Brace raw focus and target grap strings
desc: The emitted # FOCUS and # TARGET lines must show the grap-target expression as a raw brace-wrapped token, not a quoted string. For focus, print {hwnd:0x...#absTagPath}; for targets, print the grap-target token directly so it can be pasted into a shell and rerun without editing.
steps: Print # FOCUS as a brace-wrapped raw grap-target token.
Print # TARGET as a brace-wrapped raw grap-target token with hwnd-first identity.
Verify the exact installed output with a live window after deployment.
author: claude
